data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having visibility into which workflow consumed which event. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific logs or identifiers that demonstrate this visibility. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, but without concrete evidence of its implementation, it is clear that there is a gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of visibility into which workflow consumed which event.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
